source_records.excerpt: Franklin Barbecue — Everyone knows about the long lines at Franklin Barbecue — it's been well documented — but for many, it's worth the wait for those perfect briskets from James Beard Award-winning pitmaster Aaron Franklin in Central East Austin.
Franklin Barbecue - 4.6 of 5 bubbles (1,790 reviews) - American, Barbecue - Fantastic Brisket!
Tender and smoky with [brisket]... wrapped in butcher paper and weighed before being placed on the famous blue tray.

INTERSTELLAR BBQ - 4.5(712 reviews) - 12233 Ranch Rd 620 N, Austin, Texas - Barbeque - Open11:00 AM - 4:00 PM - Love the tender juice beef rib. The flavor profile is great and not too mushy. The beef brisket has a great blend of firmness and juiciness.
InterStellar BBQ - Inspector notes: Brisket with a simple salt, pepper, and garlic rub, is outstanding.
Interstellar BBQ - 8.5 rating - We've had some of the best brisket of our lives at Interstellar Barbecue.
Terry Black's Barbecue - 4.5 of 5 bubbles (1,805 reviews) - American, Barbecue - We ordered beef brisket, pork ribs, and sides of mexican rice, mac n cheese... Terry Black's Barbecue is the best!
Terry Black's Barbecue has solidified its reputation as one of the best BBQ restaurants in Austin, with a loyal following of customers who rave about the restaurant's tender, flavorful meats.
Terry Black's Barbecue - 8 ratings - conveniently located on Barton Springs Road. It's also home to solid brisket that will leave you satisfied.
Ali Clem is the James Beard recognized chef and owner behind the Texas-style smoked brisket you'll find at Michelin-starred restaurant, la Barbecue, located in Austin, Texas.
La Barbecue - Classic offerings of brisket and ribs satisfy.
La Barbecue - including places with and without lines... from Franklin Barbecue, La Barbecue, African American-slanted Distant Relatives.

LeRoy and Lewis is the best all-around barbecue experience in Austin - 9.5 rating - The smoked burgers are among the best in town, the beef cheeks are worth storming the gates for, and the brisket is a textbook example of beef slow-cooked to perfection.
LeRoy And Lewis Barbecue - If you want as good as it gets, you want LeRoy and Lewis.
new-school spot LeRoy & Lewis's new restaurant.
Louie Mueller Barbecue has been described as a cathedral of smoke due to producing the finest BBQ in all of Texas since the restaurant opened its doors in 1949.

Louie Mueller Barbecue - Named the Top BBQ joint in Texas in the inaugural issue of Texas Monthly's Best list in 1973. Louie Mueller is the only restaurant to have been named either #1 or #2 every year since.
master at central Texas-style barbecue, doling out luscious meat from ribs and brisket to sausage, pulled pork, lamb.
Snows BBQ - Voted Best BBQ in Texas by Texas Monthly Magazine - We've got Brisket, BBQ Pork Steak, Pork Spare Ribs, Chicken, Sausage.
Snows BBQ - Voted Best BBQ in Texas by Texas Monthly Magazine.
There's the Austin barbecue primer and a guide to the barbecue capital of the world, Lockhart.
CATTLEACK BARBEQUE - We're open every Wednesday, Thursday & Friday (and now, the 1st Saturday of every month) - We always recommend the ribs, brisket, pulled pork and sausage.
Cattleack - Inspector notes: The excellent barbecue menu isn't built around brisket, although that beloved item is available.
Cattleack, one of Texas' best, gets new owners.

CorkScrew BBQ - 26608 Keith St., 77373 Spring - Houston, this barbecue sensation has drawn long lines ever since it opened in 2015. The kitchen is known to sell out fast, and it's easy to see why: Will and Nichole Buckman smoke some of the finest brisket and beef ribs in the state.
CorkScrew BBQ - Everyone starts with the hulking beef rib, which often sells out before midday, and thick, melting slabs of prime-grade brisket.
CorkScrew BBQ - Best of Austin.

Goldee's Bar-B-Q - 4645 Dick Price Rd., 76140 Fort Worth - Founded by the youthful and creative cohort of Jalen Heard, Lane Milne, and Jonny White, Goldee's is the name on the lips of every barbecue aficionado seeking out great brisket in the Fort Worth area.
Goldee's - Inspector notes: The brisket here, premium Black Angus beef, is cooked low and slow using post oak sourced from nearby. The meat is meltingly tender with a rich, clean flavor.
Beautifully smoked brisket takes top billing.

Oldest BBQ Joint in Texas | The Original Black's Barbecue - Since our humble beginnings in the little town of Lockhart, TX, our family has pioneered and perfected true Texas barbecue. Today, five generations of Black's have made it possible to serve over 50 million guests.
Black's Barbecue Austin - 4.4 of 5 bubbles (370 reviews) - American, Barbecue - Great brisket, sides, and wow pecan cobbler!
The brisket is expectedly solid, while smoked pork ribs and house-made sausages are a cut above.
Rudy's Country Store & Bar-B-Q - 4.4 of 5 bubbles (2,004 reviews) - Quick Bites, American - Rudy's bbq is my go to for quick barbecue. Good brisket, turkey, beans, and cole slaw.
Vaqueros Texas Bar-B-Q - Best TX BBQ in Allen, TX - From tender hickory-smoked brisket and pork ribs to BBQ birria tacos.
Rudy's BBQ - Good brisket at its best.

Micklethwait Barbecue - 6 - 4602 Tanney St, Austin, TX 78721 - East Austin - The brisket is seasoned with a generous amount of salt and pepper coating each bite. On a good day, Micklethwait might take our top spot.
Micklethwait Barbecue - Along with a new Bib Gourmand designation from Michelin, the former food truck now boasts a Texas cowboy fare. Expect the staples (brisket, Tex-Czech sausages, ribs).
Micklethwait Barbecue - Brisket and pork ribs are must-orders.
Lockhart Smokehouse brings true Central Texas barbecue to the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex with two family-owned and operated locations in Dallas' Bishop Arts District and downtown Plano.
Lockhart Smokehouse - Dallas' Best BBQ.
Lockhart Smokehouse brings Lockhart, Texas BBQ to the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex.
Cooper's Old Time Pit Bar-B-Que is honored to be the 'Best Of The Best' in the barbecue business and home of the original World Famous Big Chop.
Cooper's BBQ - Welcome to Downtown Austin - Cooper's Old Time Pit Bar-B-Que.
Cooper's BBQ - Austin.
